name: Tri-Lakes
description_short: Tri-Lakes Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving the Adirondack region with local lending, mortgages, and full-service banking products.
description_long:
Tri-Lakes Federal Credit Union is a local credit union serving the Saranac Lake and Lake Placid communities in the Tri-Lakes and Adirondack regions of upstate New York. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates as a not-for-profit financial cooperative where members are both customers and owners. The organization is governed by a volunteer Board of Directors and Supervisory Committee, with all lending decisions made locally by staff familiar with the community.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including checking and savings accounts, auto loans, recreational vehicle loans, personal loans, mortgages, and other lending products. They currently promote an auto and RV loan refinancing special offering up to 2% APR off existing rates while maintaining remaining loan terms. Their mortgage services are provided through partnerships with local mortgage professionals. Members can access online banking, and the credit union maintains two physical branches with phone support available.

Tri-Lakes FCU distinguishes itself through its commitment to community investment and member-first philosophy. As a credit union, earnings are returned to members through lower loan rates, higher deposit interest rates, and lower fees rather than distributed to external shareholders. The organization emphasizes local decision-making, community involvement by staff and leadership, and personal relationships with members. They actively combat fraud through member education and fraud alerts, demonstrating awareness of security threats specific to their member base.

The credit union is best suited for individuals in the upstate New York region seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making and competitive rates. The primary limitation is geographic scope—membership and branch access are restricted to the Tri-Lakes and Adirondack regions, making this unavailable to consumers in other areas. Prospective members should verify eligibility requirements for membership before applying.
services: Auto loans with local lending decisions
Mortgage services through local partner lenders
pros: All lending decisions made locally by known community members rather than distant corporate offices
Member-owned cooperative structure means profits returned as lower rates, higher deposit rates, and lower fees
Full-service financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and online banking in one place
Current auto and RV loan refinancing special: up to 2% APR reduction with remaining term kept intact
Volunteer Board of Directors and Supervisory Committee ensures governance by community members
Proactive fraud prevention education and alerts to protect members from scams and identity theft
Partnership with local mortgage professionals who understand community-specific lending needs
cons: Geographic restriction: Only serves Tri-Lakes and Adirondack regions (Saranac Lake and Lake Placid), limiting accessibility
Limited branch network with only two physical locations, reducing convenience for members outside immediate areas
Website content lacks specific information about membership eligibility requirements and fee structures
No details provided about CD rates, savings account rates, or current loan rates for comparison shopping
Mortgage services are provided through external partnerships rather than in-house origination
best_for: Residents of the Tri-Lakes and Adirondack regions seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-makers
Individuals looking to refinance auto or RV loans and obtain rate reductions while maintaining existing loan terms
Community-minded consumers who prefer member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions over for-profit banks
Homebuyers in upstate New York seeking local mortgage support through community-connected professionals
diagnosis: Tri-Lakes FCU is ideal for residents of the Saranac Lake and Lake Placid communities who value member ownership, local decision-making, and relationship-based banking over national chains. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—this credit union is only accessible to those living in or eligible for the Tri-Lakes and Adirondack regions of upstate New York.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
